promptDescription: - **aardvark** — composite tree + sparkline visualization (IEEE VIS 2024 Best Paper). Renders a 2- or 3-level hierarchy on the left with an aligned time-series sparkline for every leaf node sharing a common time axis. Parent groups show aggregated area envelopes behind the leaf sparklines. Best for: product category→subcategory→SKU revenue over months; salesperson→territory→customer order trends. Requires lazy SQL returning: root (top group), branch (mid group, optional — omit or NULL for 2-level), leaf (bottom entity), period (time label e.g. '2013-01' or '2013'), value (numeric). Aggregate with GROUP BY. Example spec: {"type":"aardvark","title":"Product Revenue by Category","sql":"SELECT pc.Name AS root, ps.Name AS branch, p.Name AS leaf, FORMAT(soh.OrderDate,'yyyy-MM') AS period, CAST(SUM(sod.LineTotal) AS BIGINT) AS value FROM Sales.SalesOrderHeader soh JOIN Sales.SalesOrderDetail sod ON soh.SalesOrderID=sod.SalesOrderID JOIN Production.Product p ON sod.ProductID=p.ProductID JOIN Production.ProductSubcategory ps ON p.ProductSubcategoryID=ps.ProductSubcategoryID JOIN Production.ProductCategory pc ON ps.ProductCategoryID=pc.ProductCategoryID GROUP BY pc.Name,ps.Name,p.Name,FORMAT(soh.OrderDate,'yyyy-MM') ORDER BY pc.Name,ps.Name,p.Name,period"}
